category_title: Students with moderate to severe cognitive impairments who exhibit withdrawal or 'shut down' behaviors in inclusive settings
minimal_context: Katie is participating in a singing activity with her peers in an inclusive fourth-grade music class.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's all sing the next verse of the song together with the class.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Drones the words in a speaking-voice monotone without matching the pitch of the song.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Try to sing along with the melody.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Shows a lack of vocal effort, looking around at the other fourth-graders as if aware that the sounds she produces are not the same as those around her.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Keep trying, let's do the chorus now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Exhibits a shut down behavior, stopping her participation completely, though she is still watching the rest of the class sing.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's all sing the next verse of the song together with the class.

STUDENT: (Drones the words in a speaking-voice monotone without matching the pitch of the song.)

TUTOR: Try to sing along with the melody.

STUDENT: (Shows a lack of vocal effort, looking around at the other fourth-graders as if aware that the sounds she produces are not the same as those around her.)

TUTOR: Keep trying, let's do the chorus now.

STUDENT: (Exhibits a shut down behavior, stopping her participation completely, though she is still watching the rest of the class sing.)

context.social_setting: Surrounded by peers in an inclusive classroom

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When participating in singing activities where she cannot match pitch with her voice
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Lack of vocal effort, drones the words in a speaking-voice monotone
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Definitely aware that the sounds she produces are not the same as those around her

behavior_patterns.condition: When activities are musically beyond her readiness in the inclusive setting
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Has a lot of shut down behaviors... she seems to just need to shut down, but she is still watching
